root_queries.name: aggregates
root_queries.description: A list of aggregates

root_queries.name: aggregate
root_queries.description: A single storage aggregate

root_queries.name: clusters
root_queries.description: A list of clusters

root_queries.name: cluster
root_queries.description: A single cluster

root_queries.name: fullStack
root_queries.description: Information about the components, applications and tools that relate to ONTAP storage controllers.

root_queries.name: systems
root_queries.description: Get system information for the systems corresponding to the specified keys.

root_queries.name: summary
root_queries.description: Get summary of system, site and cluster counts at aggregated level and also the count by specific field.

root_queries.name: risks
root_queries.description: List of unique risks with affected sytems.

root_queries.name: riskMeta
root_queries.description: Retrieve risk metadata for the specified risk identifiers.

root_queries.name: riskInstances
root_queries.description: Risk details per system.

root_queries.name: risksCount
root_queries.description: Count of risks, actions, and systems for each of the possible values of the GroupBy field.

root_queries.name: systemContractRenewals
root_queries.description: Returns a list of systems with contracts or end of support that are expired or about to expire within the specified time interval.

root_queries.name: ONTAPSystemCapacity
root_queries.description: Current capacity information for a customer, site, cluster, group or system. When aggregating across multiple systems, only systems that have sent capacity data in the last 60 days are included. (When querying with systemKey, if any selected systems are ASA R2 or AFX, the result will be empty.)

root_queries.name: StorageGridCapacityExceededForecast
root_queries.description: A single StorageGrid system or a list of StorageGrid systems for a customer, site, cluster or group whose storage capacity percentage exceeds or will exceed the forecasted threshold capacity percentage, within the corresponding number of months

root_queries.name: SANtricitySystemCapacity
root_queries.description: Capacity summary for a SANtricity system

root_queries.name: workloadSummary
root_queries.description: Aggregated workload summary data for a set of systems. (ASA R2 systems are not included.)

root_queries.name: workloads
root_queries.description: A list of volumes

root_queries.name: volumes
root_queries.description: Search and filter volumes based on various criteria. Not supported on ASA R2 systems.

root_queries.name: userInfo
root_queries.description: Information about user associated with supplied access token.

root_queries.name: users
root_queries.description: Get a list of users, optionally filtered by role.

root_queries.name: user
root_queries.description: Get information for a user.

root_queries.name: roles
root_queries.description: Get all roles.

root_queries.name: energyConsumptionMetrics
root_queries.description: Fetch energy consumption metrics. If a customer, site, watchlist, cluster, or group is specified, then aggregate the metrics for its systems and shelves. If a system is specified, fetch the metrics only for the system and not its shelves since shelves can belong to multiple systems in a cluster.

root_queries.name: sustainabilityScore
root_queries.description: Fetch aggregated sustainability score. Sustainability scores are factored for systems that send AutoSupport.

root_queries.name: sites
root_queries.description: A list of sites for a given input. A site is defined as the physical location where the NetApp products reside.

root_queries.name: successPlan
root_queries.description: Customer success plans from Salesforce, scoped to sites matching the supplied filters. Returns per-site details and an on-demand summary of headline counters.

root_queries.name: simulatedWorkloadProfiles
root_queries.description: Get simulated workload profiles.

root_queries.name: cases
root_queries.description: Support cases for a set of cases. The data received through this query may lag up to 24 hours from the source application for support cases.

root_queries.name: caseSummary
root_queries.description: Support cases summary for count and trend. The data received through this query may lag up to 24 hours from the source application for support cases.

root_queries.name: customer
root_queries.description: Get customer information.

root_queries.name: customers
root_queries.description: Get customer information for the customers corresponding to the specified keys.

root_queries.name: securityFiles
root_queries.description: Get security file information.

root_queries.name: systemAutoUpdates
root_queries.description: Get system auto update information.

root_queries.name: systemFirmwares
root_queries.description: Get system firmware information.

root_queries.name: driveFirmwares
root_queries.description: Get drive firmware information.

root_queries.name: shelfFirmwares
root_queries.description: Get shelf firmware information.

root_queries.name: systemFiles
root_queries.description: Get system file information.

root_queries.name: diskQualificationPackages
root_queries.description: Get disk qualification package information.

root_queries.name: recommendations
root_queries.description: Get recommendations based on category, subcategory and score.

root_queries.name: supportOfferings
root_queries.description: Get list of features with supported service offerings.

root_queries.name: osVersions
root_queries.description: Get a list of OS versions.

fields.name: hostName
fields.description: The system hostname

fields.name: systemId
fields.description: The system system ID.

fields.name: serialNumber
fields.description: The system serial number.

fields.name: customerGroup
fields.description: Customer group of the system.

fields.name: osVersion
fields.description: OS version of the system.

fields.name: recommendedOSVersion
fields.description: Recommended OS version of the system.

fields.name: latestSalesOrder
fields.description: The most recent sales order number associated with an active contract for the system.

fields.name: originalShipDate
fields.description: The date the system was originally shipped.

fields.name: systemState
fields.description: The state of the system.

fields.name: hardwareModel
fields.description: The hardware model detailed info.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The system type.

fields.name: osType
fields.description: The OS type.

fields.name: productType
fields.description: Product  type of the system. For example filers, software applications, non filers like switches etc

fields.name: platformType
fields.description: Platform type of the system.

fields.name: contactPerson
fields.description: Netapp support contact person details

fields.name: contract
fields.description: System contract object

fields.name: systemShipmentDate
fields.description: System shipment date

fields.name: latestAsup
fields.description: Latest auto support of system

fields.name: operationalDate
fields.description: Date when the system became operational.

fields.name: ageInYears
fields.description: Indicates the duration for which the system has been operational. It is calculated as the difference between the current date and the system's operationalDate, divided by the average number of days in a year (365.25, to account for leap years), and rounded down to the nearest integer.

fields.name: autoSupports
fields.description: List of system autosupports

fields.name: risks
fields.description: Risks associated with the system.

fields.name: latestAsupOfEachType
fields.description: Latest ASUP for each ASUP type for this system.

fields.name: customer
fields.description: System customer details.

fields.name: nagp
fields.description: System NAGP details.

fields.name: site
fields.description: System site details.

fields.name: serviceTier
fields.description: Support entitlement level of the system.

fields.name: supportAddOns
fields.description: Support entitlement add-ons for this system.

fields.name: autoSupportConfig
fields.description: AutoSupport config details of a system.

fields.name: incumbentResellerCompany
fields.description: Partner (reseller) who sold the product or the latest support contract on it.

fields.name: salesRepresentative
fields.description: An employee responsible for managing the customer engagement and relationship for NetApp within the customer organization.

fields.name: csm
fields.description: Customer Success Manager.

fields.name: sam
fields.description: A SAM(Support Account Manager) is an employee assigned to customer to optimize storage infrastructure and perform as a customer advocate.

fields.name: gard
fields.description: Represents levels in which sales territory hierarchy is segregated at NetApp.

fields.name: techRefreshStatus
fields.description: Tech refresh status of the system

fields.name: utcOffset
fields.description: The UTC offset of the system's location in minutes.

fields.name: lastRebootTime
fields.description: Date of the most recent system boot.

fields.name: authorizedSupportPartner
fields.description: Authorized Support Partner (ASP) related information.

fields.name: softwareVersion
fields.description: OS version details of the system.

fields.name: domesticParent
fields.description: The domestic parent to which this system belongs.

fields.name: hyperScalerName
fields.description: Name of the hyperscaler being utilized.

fields.name: isFabricPool
fields.description: Indicates whether at least one aggregate in this system has FabricPool monitoring enabled.

fields.name: endOfSupport
fields.description: End of support dates for the system, shelf and disk.

fields.name: hasPvr
fields.description: Indicates if the system has at least one policy variance request.

fields.name: pvrs
fields.description: List of policy variance request(PVR) details of a system.

fields.name: marketingType
fields.description: The marketing type under which the system was sold.

fields.name: storageConfiguration
fields.description: The storage configuration of the system. Configuration refers to the arrangement and setup of storage hardware and its associated cabling to ensure optimal functionality and performance.

fields.name: swRecommendationDetails
fields.description: Software recommendation insights for the system.

fields.name: belongsToMixModelCluster
fields.description: Indicates whether the node is part of a cluster that includes nodes running on multiple platform models.

fields.name: monthlyUptimeStats
fields.description: Monthly uptime statistics for the system, tracking planned and unplanned downtime.

fields.name: monthlyCarbonStats
fields.description: Monthly carbon emission statistics for the system, tracking expected, actual, and avoided carbon emissions.

fields.name: monthlyResolvedRisksStats
fields.description: Monthly statistics for risks detected and resolved by the system, including total and critical severity breakdowns.

fields.name: monthlyArpStats
fields.description: Monthly Autonomous Ransomware Protection (ARP) statistics for the system.

fields.name: monthlyAutoResolvedCases
fields.description: Monthly statistics for support cases, including total cases and those resolved automatically.

fields.name: downtimeEvents
fields.description: Downtime events for this system, sourced from AutoSupport data.

fields.name: domesticParent
fields.description: The domestic parent to which this system belongs.

fields.name: hyperScalerName
fields.description: Name of the hyperscaler being utilized.

fields.name: isFabricPool
fields.description: Indicates whether at least one aggregate in this system has FabricPool monitoring enabled.

fields.name: endOfSupport
fields.description: End of support dates for the system, shelf and disk.

fields.name: hasPvr
fields.description: Indicates if the system has at least one policy variance request.

fields.name: pvrs
fields.description: List of policy variance request(PVR) details of a system.

fields.name: marketingType
fields.description: The marketing type under which the system was sold.

fields.name: storageConfiguration
fields.description: The storage configuration of the system. Configuration refers to the arrangement and setup of storage hardware and its associated cabling to ensure optimal functionality and performance.

fields.name: swRecommendationDetails
fields.description: Software recommendation insights for the system.

fields.name: belongsToMixModelCluster
fields.description: Indicates whether the node is part of a cluster that includes nodes running on multiple platform models.

fields.name: monthlyUptimeStats
fields.description: Monthly uptime statistics for the system, tracking planned and unplanned downtime.

fields.name: monthlyCarbonStats
fields.description: Monthly carbon emission statistics for the system, tracking expected, actual, and avoided carbon emissions.

fields.name: monthlyResolvedRisksStats
fields.description: Monthly statistics for risks detected and resolved by the system, including total and critical severity breakdowns.

fields.name: monthlyArpStats
fields.description: Monthly Autonomous Ransomware Protection (ARP) statistics for the system.

fields.name: monthlyAutoResolvedCases
fields.description: Monthly statistics for support cases, including total cases and those resolved automatically.

fields.name: downtimeEvents
fields.description: Downtime events for this system, sourced from AutoSupport data.

fields.name: uuid
fields.description: Unique identifier of an ONTAP system (available from ONTAP version 9.6 onwards).

fields.name: operatingMode
fields.description: The operating mode of the system. For example, if the system is participating in a cluster.

fields.name: isAllFlashOptimized
fields.description: This field indicates whether or not the system is an All Flash Array

fields.name: isFlexPod
fields.description: This field indicates whether or not the system is a FlexPod

fields.name: isMetroCluster
fields.description: Indicates if the system is a metro cluster

fields.name: isARPEnabled
fields.description: This field indicates whether Autonomous Ransomware Protection (ARP) is enabled for the ONTAP system.

fields.name: propensityCategory
fields.description: Propensity category is derived based on ONTAP system capacity forecasting value. Higher values indicates the system capacity is crossing threshold and needs attention.

fields.name: propensityTalkingPoints
fields.description: Additional details about system capacity and its threshold based on the propensity category.

fields.name: nextBestAction
fields.description: The next best action provides guidance on the recommended course of action to be taken for optimal system performance and desired outcomes.

fields.name: nextBestActionTalkingPoints
fields.description: Additional details supporting the next best action.

fields.name: lifecycleEvents
fields.description: List of lifecycle events covering contract expirations, capacity thresholds, and end of support (EOS). Each event has recommended actions ranked by priority to help you plan ahead.

fields.name: drPartner
fields.description: The disaster recovery partner node for metro cluster

fields.name: partner
fields.description: The high availability partner system for this system.

fields.name: cluster
fields.description: The cluster to which this system currently belongs.

fields.name: drCluster
fields.description: The disaster recovery cluster to which this system currently belongs.

fields.name: portInterface
fields.description: Onboard and adapter card ports.

fields.name: adapterInterface
fields.description: Adapter and network interface data for this system node, including all physical slots and their installed adapters.

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: ONTAP System capacity. (Not supported on ASA R2 and AFX systems.)

fields.name: monthlyCapacity
fields.description: Month-wise trending and forecasted capacity data. (Not supported on ASA R2 and AFX systems.)

fields.name: vcenters
fields.description: vCenter vsphere servers that manage the ONTAP system.

fields.name: cloudInsightsTenants
fields.description: Cloud Insights tenants that monitor the ONTAP system.

fields.name: cloudInsightsHosts
fields.description: Hosts monitored in the Cloud Insights application which use storage provided by the ONTAP system.

fields.name: sustainabilityScores
fields.description: Weekly sustainability scores for energy consumption based on ideal weightage set across various parameters.

fields.name: networkPorts
fields.description: Network ports on this ONTAP node.

fields.name: licenses
fields.description: An ONTAP license is a software license provided by NetApp that enables various features and functions within the ONTAP storage operating system. These licenses can be included in comprehensive packages like ONTAP One for ease of use or assigned to specific ONTAP Select capacity pools.

fields.name: energyConsumptionMetrics
fields.description: Energy consumption details of a FAS or AFF ONTAP system from AutoSupport and data published by NetApp product teams.

fields.name: shelves
fields.description: Shelves associated with the ONTAP system.

fields.name: serviceProcessorIPAddress
fields.description: IP address of Service Processor/Baseboard Management Controller platform.

fields.name: managementIPAddress
fields.description: A node-specific IP address within an ONTAP cluster, dedicated to the direct management and administration of the node.

fields.name: osUpgradeHistory
fields.description: A list containing the history of system OS upgrades.

fields.name: isNodar
fields.description: Indicates whether this system needs a No Data At Rest Encryption build of the operating system. If true, then the system is located in a restricted country which does not support NetApp Volume Encryption and requires an un-encrypted image while performing an OS upgrade.

fields.name: autoUpdateEnabled
fields.description: Automatic update setting of the system for file and firmware updates. If true, the system can update automatically once it receives  file and firmware updates.

fields.name: autoUpdateSettings
fields.description: Controls the automatic update behavior for various system components. It determines whether to automatically apply updates for security files, SP/BMC, disks, shelves, and DQP, or to simply notify the user of available updates, or to ignore update notifications altogether.

fields.name: securityFiles
fields.description: List of security file types and current and recommended versions for the system.

fields.name: motherboardFirmware
fields.description: Motherboard firmware current and recommended version.

fields.name: systemFirmware
fields.description: System firmware type and current and recommended version.

fields.name: drivesSummary
fields.description: Summary information for each drive type in the system.

fields.name: shelvesSummary
fields.description: Summary information for each shelf type in the system.

fields.name: systemFiles
fields.description: List of system file types and current and recommended versions for the system.

fields.name: diskQualificationPackage
fields.description: Disk qualification package current and recommended versions.

fields.name: ontapPersonality
fields.description: This field reflects the software personality of the ONTAP system.

fields.name: luns
fields.description: LUNs (Logical Unit Numbers) associated with this system. Not supported on AFX systems.

fields.name: namespaces
fields.description: Namespaces associated with this system.

fields.name: storageAggregates
fields.description: The storage aggregates for this system. Not supported on ASA R2 and AFX systems.

fields.name: storageVolumes
fields.description: Volumes associated with the given system. Not supported on ASA R2 systems.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The cluster identifier

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the cluster

fields.name: managementIPAddress
fields.description: The management IP address of the cluster

fields.name: osVersion
fields.description: The version of the software running on the cluster

fields.name: isNodar
fields.description: Indicates whether this cluster needs a No Data At Rest Encryption build of the operating system. If true, then the corresponding system is located in a restricted country and must use a NODAR build of the OS.

fields.name: isBlueXpConnected
fields.description: Indicates whether this cluster is connected through a BlueXP connector.

fields.name: isHAConfigured
fields.description: Indicates whether high availability (HA) is configured for this cluster.

fields.name: vmwareFlag
fields.description: Indicates whether an ONTAP cluster is deployed in a VMware environment, enabling cluster-wide VMware-specific features and behaviors.

fields.name: systemsWithCriticalPropensity
fields.description: Indicates the number of systems currently with critical propensity category.

fields.name: systemsWithHighPropensity
fields.description: Indicates the number of systems currently with high propensity category.

fields.name: operationalDate
fields.description: Date when the cluster became operational.

fields.name: ageInYears
fields.description: Indicates the duration for which the cluster has been operational. It is calculated as the difference between the current date and the system's operationalDate, divided by the average number of days in a year (365.25, to account for leap years), rounded down to the nearest integer.

fields.name: switches
fields.description: Cluster networking switch for communication between multiple data ONTAP Cluster-Mode nodes which are configured to operate in a cluster.

fields.name: bridges
fields.description: Information regarding system bridges used in the cluster. System bridges are used to connect Fibre Channel (FC) to Serial Attached SCSI (SAS) disk shelves. These bridges are typically used in MetroCluster configurations to manage and connect storage components.

fields.name: systems
fields.description: The storage systems that are currently part of this cluster.

fields.name: applications
fields.description: List of application data for a given cluster.

fields.name: vservers
fields.description: vServers associated with the cluster

fields.name: shelves
fields.description: Shelves associated with the cluster

fields.name: CMNotifications
fields.description: Notifications associated with the cluster

fields.name: recommendationAcknowledgements
fields.description: Recommendation acknowledgements for the cluster

fields.name: cloudInsightsMonitoring
fields.description: Cloud Insights monitoring details for the cluster. Multiple Cloud Insights tenants can monitor the cluster.

fields.name: cloudInsightsTenants
fields.description: Cloud Insights tenants that monitor the cluster.

fields.name: energyConsumptionMetrics
fields.description: Energy consumption details of a FAS or AFF ONTAP system from AutoSupport and data published by NetApp product teams.

fields.name: osRecommendation
fields.description: Recommendation for cluster OS upgrade.

fields.name: osUpgradeHistory
fields.description: A list containing the history of cluster OS upgrades.

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Current capacity details of the cluster.

fields.name: monthlyCapacity
fields.description: Monthly capacity details of the cluster, including historical data from the past months and forecasted data for future months. Months are in ascending order.

fields.name: storageVirtualMachines
fields.description: List of Storage Virtual Machines (SVMs) for the cluster, formerly known as VServers.

fields.name: s3Buckets
fields.description: A total count of S3 object storage buckets configured on this cluster.

fields.name: snapMirrorRelationships
fields.description: The total number of SnapMirror relationships associated with this cluster.

fields.name: serialNumber
fields.description: Serial Number of the shelf.

fields.name: shelfId
fields.description: Front panel identifier of the shelf.

fields.name: devicePath
fields.description: Local device path of the shelf

fields.name: isInternal
fields.description: Identifies if the shelf is internal or external

fields.name: logicalIdentifier
fields.description: Logical identifier of the shelf

fields.name: hardwareModel
fields.description: The shelf hardware model details.

fields.name: moduleHardwareModel
fields.description: The shelf module hardware details.

fields.name: ports
fields.description: Shelf module ports with total count.

fields.name: bays
fields.description: Drive bays in the shelf enclosure, correspond to drive.slot in the Disk schema.

fields.name: drives
fields.description: Drives associated with a shelf

fields.name: groupBy
fields.description: Group devices by specified criteria

fields.name: currentVersion
fields.description: Current firmware version.

fields.name: recommendedVersion
fields.description: Recommended firmware version.

fields.name: postingDate
fields.description: Posting date of the recommended firmware version.

fields.name: autoUpdateEligible
fields.description: Flag to indicate if this current version is eligible for automatic firmware update.

fields.name: firmwareFiles
fields.description: A list of firmware files available for updating the firmware.

fields.name: hardwareModel
fields.description: The shelf hardware model details.

fields.name: moduleHardwareModel
fields.description: The shelf module hardware details.

type_FirmwareVersion.name: FirmwareVersion
type_FirmwareVersion.description: Firmware Version information of a object.

fields.name: currentVersion
fields.description: Current firmware version.

fields.name: recommendedVersion
fields.description: Recommended firmware version.

fields.name: postingDate
fields.description: Posting date of the recommended firmware version.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Model of the system.

fields.name: modelRevision
fields.description: Revision of the system model, identifying a specific sub-version which can be used for ONTAP compatibility checks and end-of-support retrieval.

fields.name: endOfAvailability
fields.description: Platform end of availability

fields.name: endOfSupport
fields.description: Platform end of support

fields.name: hardwareCapabilities
fields.description: Maximum supported capacity and supported drive/shelf counts for this model.

type_Risk.name: Risk
type_Risk.description: List of unique risks with affected sytems.

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity of the risk, indicates impact level of the risk

fields.name: impactArea
fields.description: Impact Area of the risk

fields.name: mitigationAction
fields.description: Mitigation Action of the risk

fields.name: mitigationActionSub
fields.description: Secondary classification given as mitigation action for a risk

fields.name: riskId
fields.description: Risk Id

fields.name: isPublic
fields.description: Indicates whether the risk is public or private

fields.name: mitigationCategory
fields.description: Specifies the mitigation category for this risk.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Category of the risk.

fields.name: riskDetail
fields.description: Specifies this risk description

fields.name: potentialImpact
fields.description: Potential impact if risk is not mitigated.

fields.name: sourceObjectType
fields.description: Source object that is impacted by the risk.

fields.name: internalInfo
fields.description: Information about this risk applicable only to internal users.

fields.name: correctiveAction
fields.description: Corrective Action for this risk

fields.name: playbook
fields.description: Recommended playbook name to help you mitigate this risk.

fields.name: hasUMFixit
fields.description: Fixit availability for this risk.

fields.name: cloudManagerTemplateName
fields.description: Template name to be used in Cloud Manager for risk remediation.

fields.name: hasCloudManagerFixit
fields.description: Indicates remediation exists in Cloud Manager for the risk.

fields.name: shortName
fields.description: Short name of the risk.

fields.name: upgradeCheckType
fields.description: Specifies the type of upgrade check for the risk.

fields.name: origin
fields.description: Indicates whether this risk was proactively identified by Digital Advisor health monitoring or triggered by a NetApp support incident.

fields.name: recommendedHealthConfig
fields.description: Recommendation health detail for the risk.

fields.name: cves
fields.description: Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures(CVE) details associated with this risk.

fields.name: burtReferences
fields.description: NetApp BURT/JIRA reference identifiers (external bug tracking IDs) associated with this risk.

fields.name: riskInstances
fields.description: Risk details per system.

fields.name: weightage
fields.description: Weightage for a rule. This weightage is aggregated to calculate the score for a triggered risk.

type_RiskInstance.name: RiskInstance
type_RiskInstance.description: An occurrence of a risk on a system.

fields.name: risk
fields.description: General information about this risk.

fields.name: system
fields.description: The storage system affected by the risk

fields.name: systemRiskDetail
fields.description: Details about the risk specific to this system.

fields.name: riskTriggeredDate
fields.description: The date and time when the risk was first triggered.

fields.name: riskLastTriggeredDate
fields.description: The date and time when the risk was last triggered. Whenever the risk is triggered on a system for the first time, the riskLastTriggeredDate will be the same as riskTriggeredDate.

fields.name: riskAcknowledgementInfo
fields.description: Risk Acknowledgement details

fields.name: umFixitInfo
fields.description: Provides application details and action required for fixit.

fields.name: affectedObjects
fields.description: List of source objects on the system that are affected by the risk.

fields.name: playbook
fields.description: Name of playbook to be used to mitigate this instance of the risk.

fields.name: systemManagerURL
fields.description: System specific context sensitive URL in System Manager that can help mitigate the risk.

fields.name: fixedVersions
fields.description: List of OS or firmware versions that fix this security risk.

type_PhysicalCapacity.name: PhysicalCapacity
type_PhysicalCapacity.description: The capacity actually present on the storage device.

fields.name: rawMarketingKiB
fields.description: Total raw capacity available across all data drives

fields.name: qoqUtilizationPercentage
fields.description: Quarter-over-quarter change in system capacity utilization, indicating percentage increase or decrease in used capacity compared to the previous quarter

fields.name: yoyUtilizationPercentage
fields.description: Year-over-year change in system capacity utilization, showing the percentage difference in used capacity compared to the same quarter last year

type_LogicalCapacity.name: LogicalCapacity
type_LogicalCapacity.description: The number of apparent bits written subject to various overheads and allocated vs non-allocated storage

fields.name: usedKiB
fields.description: Total logical storage used capacity. Logical space used is physical space (bits written to disk) used plus all other storage as it appears (including space saved from storage efficiencies and that consumed by snapshots and FlexClone overheads).

type_SystemContract.name: SystemContract
type_SystemContract.description: System hardware, software and nrd(non returnable disk) contract details

fields.name: softwareContractStartDate
fields.description: Software contract start date.

fields.name: hardwareContractStartDate
fields.description: Hardware contract start date.

fields.name: nrdContractStartDate
fields.description: NRD (non returnable disk) contract start date.

fields.name: expiryDate
fields.description: Earliest contract expiration date.

fields.name: softwareContractEndDate
fields.description: Software contract end date.

fields.name: hardwareContractEndDate
fields.description: Hardware contract end date.

fields.name: nrdContractEndDate
fields.description: NRD (non returnable disk) contract end date.

fields.name: overallContractEndDate
fields.description: Overall contract end date.

fields.name: softwareContractId
fields.description: Software contract id.

fields.name: hardwareContractId
fields.description: Hardware contract id.

fields.name: nrdContractId
fields.description: NRD (non returnable disk) contract id.

fields.name: isContractActive
fields.description: Contract status of a system. Set to true if one of the NRD, SW & HW contracts are active otherwise false.

fields.name: hardwareServiceLevel
fields.description: The level of hardware support purchased on a system by the customer.

fields.name: hardwareWarrantyEndDate
fields.description: The date when the hardware warranty of the NetApp product expires

fields.name: hardwareWarrantyStartDate
fields.description: The date when the hardware warranty of the NetApp product begins.

fields.name: asupId
fields.description: Auto support identifer

fields.name: generatedDate
fields.description: Auto support generation date

fields.name: bizKey
fields.description: Auto support bizkey

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Auto support subject

fields.name: type
fields.description: Auto support type

fields.name: isManual
fields.description: Indicates if the autosupport is triggered by the user, rather than triggered by a schedule

fields.name: receivedDate
fields.description: Timestamp when NetApp received the AutoSupport message.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The aggregate id.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the aggregate.

fields.name: systemSerialNumber
fields.description: The serial number for the system that owns this aggregate.

fields.name: isInactiveDataReportingEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if reporting of infrequently accessed data is enabled.

fields.name: system
fields.description: The system to which this aggregate belongs.

fields.name: raidType
fields.description: The raid type of the aggregate.

fields.name: storageType
fields.description: The storage type of the aggregate.

fields.name: storageEfficiencyRatio
fields.description: The aggregate measure of how effectively storage space is being used.

fields.name: capacityForecast
fields.description: The historical and projected capacity forecasting for this aggregate.

fields.name: tieredKB
fields.description: The amount of data in this aggregate that has been moved to another tier.

fields.name: tieringProvider
fields.description: Object storage to which the inactive data is tiered to.

fields.name: volumeSummary
fields.description: Volume summary for the aggregate

fields.name: tieringBuckets
fields.description: StorageGrid buckets to which the inactive data in the aggregate is tiered to.

fields.name: isRoot
fields.description: Indicates if the aggregate is the root aggregate of the ONTAP system.

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Aggregate Capacity.

fields.name: offlineVolumesCount
fields.description: Number of offline volumes in the aggregate.

fields.name: sisDisabledVolumesCount
fields.description: Number of volumes in the aggregate with storage efficiency (SIS) disabled.

fields.name: sisChangeLogDisabledVolumesCount
fields.description: Number of volumes in the aggregate with SIS change log disabled.

fields.name: maxRaidSize
fields.description: Maximum RAID group size configured for the aggregate.

fields.name: snapLockMode
fields.description: The SnapLock type configured on the aggregate, which is used to commit files or snapshots to a Write Once, Read Many (WORM) state.

fields.name: volumes
fields.description: Volumes associated with an aggregate.

fields.name: isFabricPoolEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if FabricPool monitoring is enabled for this aggregate.

fields.name: raidGroups
fields.description: RAID groups associated with the aggregate.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Volume name

fields.name: id
fields.description: Volume identifier

fields.name: system
fields.description: The system to which this volume belongs.

fields.name: vserver
fields.description: vServer associated with volume

fields.name: aggregate
fields.description: A disk aggregate

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Volume capacity

fields.name: workloads
fields.description: Workloads detail

fields.name: workloadTags
fields.description: Workload tags

fields.name: protocols
fields.description: Volume protocols

fields.name: performanceSummary
fields.description: Volume performance

fields.name: volumeRecommendations
fields.description: Volume recommendations

fields.name: tieringPolicy
fields.description: Tiering Policy

fields.name: tieringMinimumCoolingDays
fields.description: Determines how many days must pass before inactive data in a volume using the Auto or Snapshot-Only policy is considered cold and eligible for tiering.

fields.name: isRoot
fields.description: Indicates if the volume is the root volume of the VServer.

fields.name: instanceUUID
fields.description: A unique identifier that distinguishes a specific NetApp volume instance throughout its lifecycle.

fields.name: snapshotCount
fields.description: Total number of snapshots on the volume.

fields.name: provisioning
fields.description: Provisioning and type attributes.

fields.name: isEncrypted
fields.description: Specifies whether the volume is encrypted to prevent unauthorized access if the device is repurposed, returned, misplaced, or stolen.

fields.name: isAutoSizeEnabled
fields.description: Indicates whether auto size is enabled for the volume.

fields.name: autoSizeMode
fields.description: The auto size mode of the volume.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State of the volume.

fields.name: isARPEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if the volume has ARP (Anti Ransomware Protection) enabled.

fields.name: files
fields.description: File count attributes

fields.name: qosPolicyGroup
fields.description: A Quality of Service (QoS) policy assigns performance limits to volume, to ensure consistent and predictable performance for workloads. An upper limit on throughput can be set to prevent a workload from overusing resources, and a lower limit can ensure critical applications receive a minimum level of performance.

fields.name: snapLockMode
fields.description: Refers to the configuration of a SnapLock volume, which is used to commit files or snapshots to a Write Once, Read Many (WORM) state.

fields.name: usedCapacityPercentage
fields.description: The percentage of total volume space used, including snapshot reserve.

fields.name: snapshotReserveUsedPercentage
fields.description: Percentage of the volume’s snapshot reserve currently consumed by Snapshot copies.

fields.name: enabledEfficiencyFeatures
fields.description: A list of enabled storage efficiency features. ONTAP offers a wide range of storage efficiency features that reduce the amount of physical space consumed by data and yield significant improvements to system performance, including faster reads of data, faster copies of datasets, and faster VM provisioning.

fields.name: id
fields.description: vServer identifier

fields.name: name
fields.description: vServer name

fields.name: type
fields.description: vServer type

fields.name: subType
fields.description: vServer sub type

fields.name: logicalInterfaces
fields.description: List of logical interfaces (LIFs) owned by this Storage Virtual Machine(vserver).

type_SnapMirrorRelationships.name: SnapMirrorRelationships
type_SnapMirrorRelationships.description: A total count of SnapMirror relationships associated with this cluster.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: The total number of SnapMirror relationships associated with this cluster.

type_NetworkInterface.name: NetworkInterface
type_NetworkInterface.description: Common fields shared by all network interface port types.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the network interface port as reported by the storage system.

type_NetworkPort.name: NetworkPort
type_NetworkPort.description: Network port configuration and status for a physical or logical interface on an ONTAP node.

fields.name: broadcastDomain
fields.description: The broadcast domain that contains this port. Broadcast domains group ports that share the same Layer 2 network and are used by ONTAP to automatically place and fail over LIFs.

fields.name: interfaceGroupOwner
fields.description: The name of the interface group that owns this port. Populated only when the port is a member of an interface group; null otherwise.

fields.name: ipspaceName
fields.description: The IPspace this port belongs to. IPspaces provide isolated networking namespaces within the cluster. Common values are 'Default' for data and management traffic and 'Cluster' for cluster interconnect traffic.

fields.name: link
fields.description: The current physical link state of the port (UP or DOWN).

fields.name: macAddress
fields.description: The hardware Media Access Control (MAC) address that uniquely identifies this network interface at Layer 2.

fields.name: maxTransmissionUnitBytes
fields.description: Maximum Transmission Unit size in bytes. Defines the largest IP packet the port can transmit without fragmentation. Standard Ethernet uses 1500 bytes; jumbo frames use 9000 bytes for improved throughput on storage traffic.

fields.name: port
fields.description: The name of the network port as reported by the node (e.g., e0a, e0b, a0a, e0a-200).

fields.name: role
fields.description: The traffic role assigned to this port, which determines the type of network communication it handles.

fields.name: speedAdministrativeMbps
fields.description: The configured port speed in Mbps. A value of 'auto' means the port negotiates speed automatically with the connected switch.

fields.name: speedOperationalMbps
fields.description: The current negotiated operating speed of the port in Mbps. A value of '0' typically indicates the link is down or the speed cannot be determined.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The physical or logical type of the network port.

deep_system_firmware_basic.error: Field "systems" of type "Query" must have a selection of subfields. Did you mean "systems { ... }"?
